Delete.ItemContent: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
Delete.CallingConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the Calling {name}? This will also delete all Talents and Features granted by this Calling.

Reset.ConfigContent: This will revert ALL settings in the Trespasser configuration to their default values. This cannot be undone.
Reset.DungeonConfirm: This will erase the round log and reset alarm, round, actions, and current room for {name}. The dungeon will be returned to a never-visited state. This cannot be undone.

Transfer.Title: Item Transfer
Transfer.Content: {user} wants to give {item} to {target}. Do you accept?
Transfer.SelectTargetHint: Select a character to receive the item:

Retreat.Title: Continue or Retreat?
Retreat.Prompt: The Peril for this round has been rolled. Do you want to continue the round or attempt a retreat?

Spark.Title: Choose Sparks
Spark.Intro: You have {count} spark(s) to assign. Each layer applies to all eligible targets.
Spark.DeedSparkDesc: Activate the deed's Spark phase effects.

Craft.Title: Apply Craft: {name}
Craft.AttrReadonlyTooltip: Key attribute is set by the first Craft applied; this Craft cannot override it.
Craft.AttrFirstTooltip: Your first Craft determines your key attribute (required).

Ammo.Title: Select Ammo
Ammo.Prompt: Choose an ammo to use with {name}:

SpendAP.Title: Spend Action Points
SpendAP.Question: How many Action Points do you want to spend on this deed?

ApplyOil.Title: Apply Oil
ApplyOil.Prompt: Choose a weapon to apply {name} to:

Party.SelectAttribute: Select an attribute for the group check.
Party.SelectParticipantsHint: Which members are participating in this check?

Rest.RDDialogNote: How many Recovery Dice do you want to spend?

EventClock.Name: Clock Name
EventClock.PlayerNameHint: Leave empty to show the real name to players.
